title: Pragmatic creative provisioning await before planning
description:
Council finding: SetGoal() kicks off ProvisionGoalIfCreativeAsync(goal, CancellationToken.None) without awaiting it, then immediately continues into goal setup and planning. Creative provisioning can race against planning, reintroducing stale inventory.

Fix: Make creative provisioning a hard precondition of goal activation. Add await before allowing planning to proceed. This is a pragmatic fix — a cleaner extraction into AgentProvisioningService is deferred to Sprint 59+.

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
Audit source: Audits A, B, D
